The '''Blue Moon''' is one of the three [[Moons of Peril]] imprisoned in [[Neypotzli]]. She is one of the [[nagua]] -alongside the [[Blood Moon]] and [[Eclipse Moon]]- who were originally summoned by a powerful shaman facing imminent death. Her companions disapproved and created Neypotzli to imprison the Moons and keep them from inflicting harm.{{CiteNPC|npc=Eyatlalli|quote=In the face of inevitable death, a powerful shaman decided to lash out and inflict death on others. Her fellows disagreed with her actions. They created this prison, and they summoned me to watch over it.}}

The Blue Moon has a unique [[flat armour]] stat of -5, which increases the damage dealt against her by 5. As a result of this, weapons which deal damage via multiple hitsplats are particularly effective here.

If you are logged out or disconnect during the Weapon Freeze special attack, your weapon can be reclaimed from [[Eyatlalli]].

==Fight overview==
{{Main|Moons of Peril/Strategies#Boss mechanics}}

The boss' standard attacks are a series of three hits, rolling accuracy and damage against the player's melee defence. Once the boss misses one of the hits, the remaining hits in the stack will automatically miss. Not having enough defence and being hit by the boss will cause your hands to freeze, causing you to miss attacks.

After six standard attacks, she will use one of two special attacks, alternating between them:
* '''Weapon Freeze''' - Your weapon is forcefully removed and placed in a block of ice, where you must punch the ice with Eyatlalli's glyph under it. Icy spikes will also periodically appear that must be avoided.
* '''Frost Storm''' - Two braziers at the ends of the chamber are extinguished. Run to each and relight them, whilst avoiding the moving storms that deal damage and force you to walk for two ticks. The boss will also heal five times during the storm, restoring 10 health for each unlit brazier.  Restoring both braziers will also remove a portion of stacks from Curse of the Moon.
Stand in the sun symbol that rotates around the boss during regular attacks. Remaining outside the symbol will cause you to take increasing damage over time.
